{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302074019B38D6037E2275550A2"}"},"total":761},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611381959186187033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写个书评，总体看下来是非常上瘾的，核心在于自己也是互联网上的经历者，我自己就是做企业信息化这块的，im、saas、apaas、云文档、云视频这块都涉及过，特别是一部分商业逻辑视角清奇，看的蛮过瘾的，我记得没错的话，直播先行者是yy，那会虽然视频质量差但是什么公会战，pk等一晚上消费过百万的世纪pk也参与过，情感部分不表，商业部分90分有了，加油给个4星易盼努力","text_exts":[{"e":28,"s":25,"text":"互联网","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%92%E8%81%94%E7%BD%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202860275550A2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611381959186187033%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227570418676646562841%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%92%E8%81%94%E7%BD%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772166027,"group_id":"7570418676646562841","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"10起步的网虫，一股脑扎进网文界与各位道友拼杀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwLN+v955wkBgwPAMw1r7lf8ZPb0uinPSFCVWvGBa1fK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2546922536836109","user_name":"练笔狂人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2546922536836109","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":177,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570418676646562841","book_info":{"abstract":"评分刚出，放心食用。【白月光+无系统+慢节奏+白月光+不种马+实业兴邦】
谢邀，人在2011，刚下时光机。
上一世，顾屿因自卑错过白月光，活成大龄社畜。
这一世，带着2025年的记忆重启人生，他不做选择题，他全都要！
【核心外挂】未来十五年全球大事件全知全能！
开局只有47块5？
反手一篇《欧债危机预言》，让华尔街大佬跪求指点！
利用信息差降维打击，做空欧元狂卷一亿四千万！
所有人都在抢苹果4S，他却全款买下比亚迪，布局万亿新能源帝国！
当同龄人还在为月考发愁时，
顾屿已经坐在茶楼里，教金融巨鳄怎么做人：
“在这个草台班子世界里，我就是唯一的剧透者。”
至于那位高冷校花？
顾屿（坏笑）：同桌，这道数学题我不会，教教我呗？
